status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Gabinete de Segurança Institucional da Presidência da República
alternate_names: Institutional Security Office of the Presidency
notes: Coordinates Brazil's national cybersecurity policy and critical-infrastructure protection.

data.description: Brazil's first national cybersecurity policy, establishing the Comitê Nacional de Cibersegurança (CNCiber) and coordinating protection of critical infrastructure and federal public administration under GSI's executive secretariat.
data.notes: Superseded/updated by the second-generation Estratégia Nacional de Cibersegurança (e-Ciber, Decreto 12.573/2025) below.

data.description: Second-generation national cybersecurity strategy, published August 4, 2025, replacing the 2020 strategy. Emphasizes digital sovereignty, resilience, and critical-services protection alongside PNCiber (secid:regulation/gov.br/gsi/pnciber).
